title: The Distance
why_this_song: The Distance by Cake (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 20 times; first heard in: "But he's driving and striving and hugging the turns"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "He's going the distance"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "She's all alone (all alone)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "He's going the distance"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Engines pumping and thumping in time"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "he's" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Reluctantly crouched at the starting line

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Cake one question about "The Distance", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Cake sobre "The Distance", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Distance" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Distance" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Distance" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Distance" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
